titleStmt.title: SII 25.54: original edition by M. D. Sampath
No. 54. (A.R. No. 54 of 1908.) VAḺUVŪR, WANDIWASH TALUK, NORTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

summary.p: North, West and South walls of the central shrine in the Brahmapurīśvara temple.

The record may be assigned on palaeographical grounds to about 13th century. The details of date given viz., year 5, Tulā, śu 3, Saturday, Anushanakshatra cannot be tallied in the absence of identification of the king.

It records the grant of lands, etc in the village Śāttaṉūr in Irumbēḍunāḍu in Veṇkuṉṟak-kōṭṭam in Jayaṅgoṇḍaśōḻa-maṇḍalam by the nāṭṭavar of Śāḷukki-paṟṟu as tirunāmattak-kāṇi-iṟaiyili to the deity Tiru-Ayaṉīśuramuḍaiya-nāyaṉār of Śōḻanallūr belonging to the same nāḍu. The kāṇi lands of the village Śāttaṉūr were once sold as Ta(Cha)ṇḍēśura-peruvilai. It is stated that for a long period they were left uncared in the absence of their kāṇiyāḷar (ivvūr kāṇiyāḷar illāmal pulattalaiyāyk-kiḍaikkaiyil).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī tiruvāykkeḻvi muṉṉāka ko Iraviyaṉmar Āṉa tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīkulacekaratevaṟku yāṇṭu 5 Aiñcāvatu tulānāyaṟṟu pūrvapakṣattu tritiyaiyum caṉikkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa Aṉiḻattu nāḷ jayaṅkoṇṭa coḻa maṇṭalattu veṇkuṉṟak koṭṭattu Irumpeṭu nāṭṭu kaṭanta coḻanallūr Āḷuṭaiyār tiruayaṉī curamuṭaiya nāyaṉāṟku caḷukkipaṟṟu nāṭṭavarom taṇṭe curaperuvilaiyāka viṟṟa kāṇiyāvatu Ikkoṭṭattu Iṉṉāṭṭuc cāttaṉūr
nerunāḷppaṭa Ivvūr kāṇiyāḷar Illāmal pulattalaiyāyk kiṭakkaiyil Ivvūr Innāyaṉāṟku tirunāmattuk kāṇiyāka Ivvūr nāṟpāṟkellaikkuṟpaṭṭa naṉcey nilamum puṉcai nilamum nattamum Ēriyum Eriniṟkoḷum maramuṅkiṇaṟum potuvum potāriyum maṟṟum Eppeṟppaṭṭa pirāttikaḷumuḷppaṭa Ivvāṇṭai Aṟpacimāta mutal tirunāmattuk kāṇiyākak kuṭuttom Ivvūṟ mulataḷinikki
kaṭamai Āyam poṉvari kācu kaṭamai kāttikaip paccai nāṭṭuvari taṟiyiṟai taṭṭārap yāpāṭṭam maravaṭai kācāyvaṟkam pala kuṭiyiṟai vācal vari maṟṟum Eppeṟpaṭṭa karaṅkaḷum Innāyaṉārku sarvvamāṉiyamākak kuṭuttom Ippaṭi tirunāmattukkāṇi Iṟaiiliyākak kuṭutta cāttaṉūṟku varum kaṭamai kuṭimai Eppeṟpaṭṭa Upātikaḷum nāṭṭukke paramāka Iṟuttuk kuṭukka kaṭavomākavum Ippaṭi Innāyaṉāṟku
Ic cāttaṉūr tirunāmattukkāṇi Iṟaiiliyākac cantirātittavarai celvatākak kallilum cempilum veṭṭik kuṭuttom Āḷuṭaiyār tiruvayaṉicuramuṭaiya nāyaṉāṟku caḷukkippaṟṟu nāṭṭavarom paṇiyāl Ivai nāṭṭuk kaṇakku ka veḷāṉ Eḻuttu § Ippaṭikku Ivai peruṅ nakar niyamaṅkāṟiya(m)ṅkiḻāṉ pallavarāyaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai vitinūr cempiyataraiyaṉeḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivaicaḷukki vaṇṇakkaṉ vaṇikarātittaṉ Eḻuttu
Ippaṭikku Ivai maṅkalanallūr ko ntai kaḷappāḷarāyaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai kuvaḷaik kulottuṅkap pallavarayaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai kiṇaṟu māpeṟuṅ kaṟavūrkiḻavaṉ cantarapperumāṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai Ā yāṟṟūr kaṇṇinakai vikkirama coḻap pallavaraiyaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai perunakar koññaivaḷavaṉ muventaveḷāṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai vitinūr tiru na
Ivai vicaiyapālaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai puttuḻāṉ vayiravaṉ Eḻuttu
Digital edition of SII 25.54 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
